thread.title: Trump picks ex-adviser Brooke Rollins for agriculture chief
thread.title_full: Trump picks ex-adviser Brooke Rollins for agriculture chief

author: Tony Czuczka Bloomberg News (TNS)
title: Trump picks ex-adviser Brooke Rollins for agriculture chief
text: WASHINGTON — President-elect Donald Trump picked Brooke Rollins as U.S. secretary of agriculture, tapping a member of his first-term White House team and elevating another loyalist to his incoming administration. Rollins’ commitment to supporting farmers, food self-sufficiency and the restoration of agriculture-dependent American small towns “is second to none,” Trump said Saturday in a statement. kAm#@==:?D 9625D E96 p>6C:42 u:CDE !@=:4J x?DE:EFE6[ H9:49 D96 7@F?565 :? a_a` E@ 96=A =2J E96 8C@F?5H@C A’D 6G6?EF2= C6EFC?
